'''govangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhabdoidal|rhabdoidal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-v-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhabdoidal|rhabdoidal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| govangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:govangithi|govangithi]] || [[word:govangiji|govangiji]] || [[word:govangishi|govangishi]] || [[word:govangiki|govangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:govanguthuthu|govanguthuthu]] || [[word:govangujuju|govangujuju]] || [[word:govangushushu|govangushushu]] || [[word:govangukuku|govangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:govanguthu|govanguthu]] || [[word:govanguju|govanguju]] || [[word:govangushu|govangushu]] || [[word:govanguku|govanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:govangufthuf|govangufthuf]] || [[word:govangufjuf|govangufjuf]] || [[word:govangufshuf|govangufshuf]] || [[word:govangufkuf|govangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:govangethe|govangethe]] || [[word:govangeje|govangeje]] || [[word:govangeshe|govangeshe]] || [[word:govangeke|govangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:govangothotho|govangothotho]] || [[word:govangojojo|govangojojo]] || [[word:govangoshosho|govangoshosho]] || [[word:govangokoko|govangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:govangotho|govangotho]] || [[word:govangojo|govangojo]] || [[word:govangosho|govangosho]] || [[word:govangoko|govangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:govangofthof|govangofthof]] || [[word:govangofjof|govangofjof]] || [[word:govangofshof|govangofshof]] || [[word:govangofkof|govangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:govangïfthïf|govangïfthïf]] || [[word:govangïfjïf|govangïfjïf]] || [[word:govangïfshïf|govangïfshïf]] || [[word:govangïfkïf|govangïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:govangïfthïfthïf|govangïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:govangïfjïfjïf|govangïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:govangïfshïfshïf|govangïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:govangïfkïfkïf|govangïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:govangïfthïf|govangïfthïf]] || [[word:govangïfjïf|govangïfjïf]] || [[word:govangïfshïf|govangïfshïf]] || [[word:govangïfkïf|govangïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:govangïfthïf|govangïfthïf]] || [[word:govangïfjïf|govangïfjïf]] || [[word:govangïfshïf|govangïfshïf]] || [[word:govangïfkïf|govangïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:govangæthæ|govangæthæ]] || [[word:govangæjæ|govangæjæ]] || [[word:govangæshæ|govangæshæ]] || [[word:govangækæ|govangækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:govangathatha|govangathatha]] || [[word:govangajaja|govangajaja]] || [[word:govangashasha|govangashasha]] || [[word:govangakaka|govangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:govangatha|govangatha]] || [[word:govangaja|govangaja]] || [[word:govangasha|govangasha]] || [[word:govangaka|govangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:govangafthaf|govangafthaf]] || [[word:govangafjaf|govangafjaf]] || [[word:govangafshaf|govangafshaf]] || [[word:govangafkaf|govangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:govangasha|govangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:govangshësha|govangshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govangrosha|govangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govangmusha|govangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:govangyasha|govangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogovangnkshësha|gogovangnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogovangnkrosha|gogovangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogovangnkmusha|gogovangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogovangnkyasha|gogovangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:govavangasha|govavangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:govavangshësha|govavangshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govavangrosha|govavangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govavangmusha|govavangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:govavangyasha|govavangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogovavangnkshësha|gogovavangnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogovavangnkrosha|gogovavangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogovavangnkmusha|gogovavangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogovavangnkyasha|gogovavangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gevængasha|gevængasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gevængshësha|gevængshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gevængrosha|gevængrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gevængmusha|gevængmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gevængyasha|gevængyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogevængnkshësha|gogevængnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogevængnkrosha|gogevængnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogevængnkmusha|gogevængnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogevængnkyasha|gogevængnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:govfangasha|govfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:govfangshësha|govfangshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govfangrosha|govfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govfangmusha|govfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:govfangyasha|govfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogovfangnkshësha|gogovfangnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogovfangnkrosha|gogovfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogovfangnkmusha|gogovfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogovfangnkyasha|gogovfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
